name: Texas Direct Auto
signals: Independent used-car volume operator; competes head-on with Carvana and CarMax in TX
No-haggle pricing on every unit; transparent fee structure on the website
Active out-of-state sales pipeline; ships nationwide via partnered haulers
Houston metro is a top-10 used-vehicle market by volume; high cross-county titling load
Recent Carvana retrenchment in TX creates dealer-share opportunity
aboutCopy: Texas Direct Auto is one of the largest independent used-vehicle retailers in Texas. We carry trucks, SUVs, sedans, and luxury vehicles, with no-haggle pricing and full delivery anywhere in the lower 48.
